Metadata.homeTitle: TactLink | Reimagine Networking with Smart Directory
Metadata.homeDesc: TactLink's revolutionary smart directory and name card app transforms professional networking. Go paperless, foster collaboration, and grow your community.
Metadata.aboutDesc: TactLink is transforming professional networking with a digital-first platform that eliminates paper business cards, connects communities globally, and contributes to UN SDGs.
Metadata.contactDesc: Have questions or want to partner with us? Get in touch with the TactLink team.
Metadata.namecardDesc: Create and share your digital namecard instantly. Scan paper cards with AI-powered OCR and manage all your connections in one smart directory.
Metadata.privacyDesc: Our Privacy Policy explains how TactLink collects, uses, and protects your data.
Metadata.termsDesc: Read the official Terms & Conditions for using TactLink.

Footer.tagline: Reimagine Networking with Smart Directory. Transform professional networking, go paperless, foster collaboration, and grow your community.

Home.heroDesc: Turn your static member list into a thriving, interactive digital community. Partner with us and get premium access — <highlight>completely free, forever.</highlight>
Home.whyDesc: Traditional associations rely on scattered tools — Excel sheets, WhatsApp groups, manual bank transfers. TactLink unifies your entire community into one seamless digital ecosystem.
Home.stillOldWay: Still doing things the old way?
Home.compareOld0Sub: Fragmented, unsearchable member lists hidden in static spreadsheets.
Home.compareOld1Sub: Clunky paper tickets, boring mixers, and zero post-event engagement.
Home.compareOld2Sub: Exhausting manual work chasing bank receipts and updating rows by hand.
Home.compareNew0Sub: A centralized hub with rich, real-time digital namecards for every member.
Home.compareNew1Sub: All-in-one toolkit with frictionless ticketing and instant networking.
Home.compareNew2Sub: Automated dues collection, smart reminders, and zero-fee receipt approvals.
Home.firstInCountry: Be the first association in {country} on TactLink
Home.growingIn: We're growing in {country}. Partner with us and put your association on this page.
Home.feat1Desc: Give your members a centralized hub to discover, connect, and collaborate with one another. Each member gets a rich digital namecard that they can update in real-time.
Home.feat1Bullet0: Search and filter members by industry or role
Home.feat1Bullet1: Beautiful digital namecards for every user
Home.feat1Bullet2: Secure, private ecosystem for verified members
Home.feat2Desc: Orchestrate unforgettable events with our all-in-one digital toolkit. From discovery to post-event engagement, empower your members to seamlessly register, connect, and participate.
Home.feat2Bullet2: Interactive participant directory for instant networking
Home.feat3Desc: Eliminate manual admin work with automated dues collection, smart reminders, and instant status updates the moment a payment clears. Stop chasing bank receipts.
Home.feat3Bullet0: Comprehensive membership management with smart reminders
Home.feat3Bullet1: Actionable insights via a real-time analytics dashboard
Home.feat3Bullet3: Seamless one-click data exports to Excel or CSV
Home.howDesc: Digitize your entire community in three simple steps. We handle the heavy lifting so you can focus on building relationships.
Home.step1Desc: Set up your association on TactLink and customize your digital hub.
Home.step2Desc: Onboard your community by inviting members directly into the platform.
Home.step3Desc: Launch interactive events and watch your member engagement soar.
Home.ctaDesc: Partner with TactLink and get access to the full platform — completely free. Join the forward-thinking organizations already transforming their communities.
Home.ctaFree: Free for partners. No credit card required.

About.heroDesc: At TactLink, we're digitizing connection to build stronger communities, foster global collaboration, and protect our planet. We believe that every great opportunity starts with a simple, meaningful link.
About.storyP1: Our journey began not in a boardroom, but in the bustling halls of large-scale professional events. As passionate networkers ourselves, we lived the frustration firsthand: pockets full of paper business cards, countless missed connections, and the nagging feeling that valuable business matching opportunities were slipping away.
About.storyP2: Traditional networking was broken. Information was static, easily lost, and failed to bridge the gap for international collaboration. We saw colleagues and friends, full of potential, unable to connect effectively simply because the tools were outdated.
About.storyP3: This shared frustration became our inspiration. We envisioned a world where networking was seamless, intelligent, and dynamic. That vision is TactLink — a digital solution born from a real-world need, built for a global community of forward-thinkers.
About.sol0Desc: Our smart directory is tailor-made for professional associations, creating a vibrant, accessible internal network where members can easily find and connect with each other.
About.sol1Desc: Transform any gathering with powerful networking tools. Using simple QR codes, attendees can exchange information instantly, creating a dynamic and engaging experience.
About.sol2Desc: Break down geographical barriers. TactLink provides the readily accessible information needed to foster crucial business connections on an international scale.
About.conscienceDesc: We believe progress should not come at the expense of our planet. By replacing paper cards with a superior digital tool, TactLink champions sustainability while empowering every professional relationship.
About.teamDesc: Our leadership team combines deep industry expertise with a passion for innovation to build the future of networking and connection.
About.member0Bio: Managing Partner at GDPS International and recognized in "Successful People in Malaysia and Singapore" by British Publishing House.
About.member1Bio: A Deep Learning Expert from Neura Robotics GmbH with a Ph.D. from Monash University who secured pre-seed funding from Nvidia & Cradle Fund.
About.member2Bio: Audit Partner at Thelyx and a MOF Licensed Tax Agent & Auditor holding multiple fellowships including MIA, MICPA, FCCA, and ASEAN CPA.
About.ctaDesc: Ready to transform how you connect, collaborate, and contribute? Step into the future of networking today.

Contact.heroDesc: Ready to upgrade your association's network, or just have a question? We're here to help you grow across Southeast Asia.
Contact.partnerDesc: Looking to implement TactLink for your association or enterprise? Reach out to our regional business development team directly — we respond within 24 hours.
Contact.emailRoutingDesc: Select your country and we will route your email to the right regional team:
Contact.respondTime: We typically respond within 1 business day.
Contact.appSupportDesc: Facing issues with the mobile app? We can help.
Contact.pressDesc: Story angles, media assets, and PR.
Contact.generalDesc: Anything else you'd like to know.

Namecard.heroDescDesktop: Instantly share dynamic digital identities, scan paper cards with AI-powered OCR, and manage connections effortlessly.
Namecard.heroDescMobile: Share digital namecards, scan paper cards with OCR, and manage all your connections in one app.
Namecard.feat1Desc: Build a beautiful, dynamic namecard that reflects who you are — then share it instantly with anyone, anywhere.
Namecard.feat1Bullet0: Create multiple identities — work, personal, freelance, and more.
Namecard.feat1Bullet1: Share via QR code — no app needed on the receiver's end.
Namecard.feat1Bullet2: Share a link via message, email, or social — one tap, instant profile.
Namecard.feat1Bullet3: Customise your card with your photo and bio.
Namecard.feat2Desc: Every connection you make lives in one smart, searchable directory — and the relationship doesn't stop at the exchange.
Namecard.feat2Bullet0: Scan physical business cards instantly with AI-powered OCR.
Namecard.feat2Bullet1: Collect namecards via QR scan — saved automatically to your directory.
Namecard.feat2Bullet2: Tag and organise contacts — Client, Event Attendee, Marketing Lead, and more.
Namecard.feat2Bullet3: Chat directly with your connections from within the app.
Namecard.feat2Bullet4: Follow updates and posts from people in your network.
Namecard.premiumDesc: Take your networking to the next level with powerful tools designed exclusively for professionals.
Namecard.prem0Desc: Access your cards and directory seamlessly across all your phones and tablets.
Namecard.prem1Desc: Give your assistant limited access to add contacts and take notes on your behalf — no confidential information exposed.
Namecard.prem2Desc: Export your entire network as a CSV and share it directly with anyone.
Namecard.prem3Desc: No cap on your network. Store, organize, and search an unlimited number of connections.
Namecard.prem4Desc: Create tailored digital identities for every context. One for business, one for freelance, and one for personal networking — with zero limits.
Namecard.referralDesc: Love TactLink? Help your community go paperless. Introduce TactLink to your association or chamber of commerce, and if they partner with us, we'll upgrade your personal account to TactLink Premium completely free.
Namecard.socialProofDesc: Join thousands who have revolutionized how they network.
Namecard.testimonial0Text: TactLink completely changed how I network across SE Asia. I effortlessly manage different profiles for my e-commerce ventures and tech startups. So professional!
Namecard.testimonial1Text: The OCR scanner is a lifesaver after regional pitch events. What used to take me hours of manual data entry now takes 5 minutes. My investor pipeline is always up to date.
Namecard.testimonial2Text: Sleek, fast, and always works. I get compliments from enterprise clients every time they scan my QR code. Ditching paper was the best choice for my business.
Namecard.ctaTitle: Ready to ditch the paper cards?
Namecard.ctaDesc: Download the TactLink app today and create your first dynamic digital identity in less than 2 minutes.
